And, and so what that, that means is just like, there's like AI answers are a black box, right?
So unlike, unlike SEO, where you can see how many people are searching for a certain keyword and things like that, and try to figure that out.
Like with LLMs, like you can't really figure out how many people went to chat GPT yesterday and type this 500 word prompt into it, right?

And so you have to take an audience first approach, which comes from a deeper understanding.
Of your audience.

And so a lot of what we do is like understanding, like, it's not only coming in and understanding all the context on you, what you do and who you are for, but also like understanding all your competitors, how they're perceiving you versus all your competitors, what content your competitors are creating and things like that, as well as like starting to define your personas for like a better word, like your audience overall.

A knowledge graph or a map, right, of all the different topics that your audience will care about.

And
